# Two Desks

> Two Desks is a small studio making thoughtful, privacy-first mobile apps. Tendi is its first public product.

Two Desks is run by Harry and Vasso. The studio builds mobile apps that respect user time, data, and attention. Its first app, Tendi, is a private mood journal for iPhone and Apple Watch.

## Primary Pages

- [Two Desks homepage](https://twodesks.app/): Studio overview, values, Tendi link, and contact information.
- [Two Desks privacy policy](https://twodesks.app/privacy.html): Website privacy details covering contact email, GitHub Pages hosting, Cloudflare-provided site services, and the absence of advertising trackers.

## Related Sites

- [Tendi](https://tendijournal.app/): Private mood journal from Two Desks.
- [Tendi privacy policy](https://tendijournal.app/privacy.html): App and website privacy details for Tendi.

## Contact

- [Email Two Desks](mailto:hello@twodesks.app): General studio contact.
- [Security contact](https://twodesks.app/.well-known/security.txt): Security vulnerability disclosure contact.
